ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "source_title" TEXT /* Source title of the publication (e.g., journal name) */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "total_citations" INTEGER /* Total number of citations received by the publication */,
  "indoor" TEXT /* Whether the publication is related to indoor research or not */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper, book chapter) */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page range of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the publication */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Publication status (e.g., published, in press, accepted) */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Funding sources for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., journal, conference, book) */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the source */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN number of the source */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_sources" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic (for hierarchical topics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_topics" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's team */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser/device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication receiving the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was received */,
  "citation_source" TEXT /* Source of the citation (e.g., journal article, conference paper) */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context of the citation (e.g., introduction, discussion) */,
  "citation_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the citation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_publications" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication receiving the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id", "publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)
column_names: Source title of the publication (e.g., journal name)
